desc: ClashSolverConnectIntoNearestNode2dByRevitNativeCommand — strict 2D variant of CONNECT_INTO_NEAREST_NODE with elbow fallback.
summary: ClashSolverConnectIntoNearestNode2dByRevitNativeCommand — strict 2D variant of CONNECT_INTO_NEAREST_NODE with elbow fallback.
usecase: Solver 2D wire-up after a plan-view move.
precondition: Active document; source element resolvable; at least one candidate in 2D radius at same Z.
postcondition: Either one ConnectTo / NewElbowFitting or no change.
logictree:
1) Validate Resolver_ElementUniqueId.
2) Instantiate ConnectorOpsConnectIntoNearestNodeIn2dCommand, copy resolvers,
   set AllowCrossSystemWithWarning=false.
3) Delegate Execute.
4) Tag tracker with strict_system_match=true + delegated_to.

preprompts: Plan-view connect with strict system match…
